title: Gooey Spicy Canadian Citrus Peel Stir-fry
description: This festive dish features a gooey and citrusy twist on traditional stir-fries, seasoned with spicy chili to add a delightful kick of flavor.

ingredients.name: Orange zest
ingredients.amount: 2 oranges, zested and juiced (for additional flavor)

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and chili flakes; sauté until fragrant but not browned.
Stir in orange zest and zested portion of oranges. Sauté for about 1 minute, allowing the zest to infuse with flavors.
Pour in glutathione powder or liquid glutathione, soy sauce, coconut sugar, and rice vinegar; stir well until mixture is smooth.
Gently add diced chicken breast pieces and broccoli florets. Stir-fry for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve the dish over cooked noodles or as a side to grilled meats. Garnish with chopped green onions before serving.
